scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @url-checker/api" "npm run dev -w @url-checker/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @url-checker/api && npm run build -w @url-checker/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @url-checker/api && npm run typecheck -w @url-checker/web
